name: Chicken Giblet Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: Parsley flakes, 1 1/2 tbsp OR Fresh parsley, minced, 3 tbsp
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the giblets and discard all fat pieces. Place in a large cooking pot with water and salt (if needed).
2. Bring to a boil and simmer for about 25 minutes.
3. Add carrot, onion, celery, parsley leaves, tomato juice, and parsley flakes or minced parsley. Simmer gently for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Remove the giblets, chop into small pieces, and return them to the soup.
5. Add oatmeal, stir, and simmer for 5 more minutes.
This recipe serves 6. Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGE. Low-sodium diets: Omit salt or substitute unsalted tomato juice. CHO: 7g; PRO: 5g; FATS: 1g; CAL: 56.
